name: autoresearch
description: Autonomous improvement engine for Codex CLI. Runs modify-verify-keep/discard loops, debugging, fixing, security review, shipping, scenario generation, prediction, learning, and reasoning workflows.

interface.longDescription: Bring Karpathy-style autoresearch loops into Codex CLI with explicit skills and slash commands for optimization, planning, debugging, fixing, security auditing, shipping, scenario generation, prediction, documentation, and adversarial reasoning.
defaultPrompt: Run autoresearch to improve test coverage in this repo
Use autoresearch to debug and fix failing checks
Run autoresearch security and ship-readiness workflows
